Dialog.Welcome.Title: Welcome to [ProductName]
Dialog.Welcome.Description: Click Install to begin the installation.
Dialog.Welcome.DescriptionFull: The Setup Wizard will install [ProductName] on your computer. Click Next to continue or Cancel to exit the Setup Wizard.
Dialog.License.Title: License Agreement
Dialog.License.Description: Please read the following license agreement.
Dialog.License.Accept: I &accept the terms in the License Agreement
Dialog.InstallDir.Title: Destination Folder
Dialog.InstallDir.Description: Click Next to install to this folder, or click Change to install to a different folder.
Dialog.InstallDir.Label: Install [ProductName] to:
Dialog.Customize.Title: Custom Setup
Dialog.Customize.Description: Select the features you want installed.
Dialog.SetupType.Title: Setup Type
Dialog.SetupType.Description: Choose the setup type that best suits your needs.
Dialog.SetupType.TypicalDesc: Installs the most common program features. Recommended for most users.
Dialog.SetupType.CustomDesc: Allows you to choose which program features will be installed.
Dialog.SetupType.CompleteDesc: All program features will be installed. (Requires the most disk space.)
Dialog.InstallScope.Title: Installation Scope
Dialog.InstallScope.Description: Choose whether to install [ProductName] for all users or just for you.
Dialog.InstallScope.AllUsersDesc: Installs for all users. Requires administrator privileges.
Dialog.InstallScope.CurrentUserDesc: Installs only for the current user.
Dialog.Progress.Title: Installing [ProductName]
Dialog.Progress.Description: Please wait while [ProductName] is being installed.
Dialog.Complete.Title: Setup Complete
Dialog.Update.Title: Update Available
Dialog.Update.Description: A newer version ({0}) is available. Would you like to update now?
